LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ESTATE OF DONATUS MCCOY'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. COURT TO REVIEW THE PROPOSED ORDER AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: PETRUCCI. (301/RCE)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2024 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PLAINTIFF ESTATE OF DONATUS MCCOY'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

The unopposed Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is granted.

Court to review the proposed order submitted by plaintiff.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Petrucci. (301/RCE)
